data.title: Artelo Biosciences reveals findings from a food effect study on ART26.12, a non-opioid pain treatment. #paintherapy #research
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest in the past decade. The report also highlighted that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the stock market hit a record high, with the main index closing at 35,000 points for the first time. This positive economic growth has raised hopes for steady recovery in the coming months.

data.title: OneMedNet grows revenue projects under agreement with top medical device leader, expanding success.
data.description: OneMedNet has broadened various revenue-generating projects through an ongoing partnership with a leading medical device company. This expansion is facilitated by an Evergreen Agreement and encompasses a variety of initiatives contributing to the company’s revenue stream. The partnership involves a significant collaboration on multiple projects, highlighting the fruitful relationship between OneMedNet and the medical device leader.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs reach $11B, combined with Bitcoin total $244B AUM. Digital asset products saw $3.75B inflows. ETH led with $2.87B, BTC $552M, Solana $176.5M, XRP $125.9M.
data.description: Last week, digital asset investment products experienced significant inflows totaling $3.75 billion, marking the fourth-largest influx on record. This surge pushed the total assets under management (AuM) to a new peak of $244 billion, as reported by CoinShares. The increase showcases a notable rebound in investor sentiment following a period of subdued flows, with the majority of activity centered around iShares. Among the digital assets, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) stood out by attracting $2.87 billion, which accounted for 77 percent of the total inflows and brought its year-to-date inflows to a record high of $11 billion. Additionally, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) products saw an increase of $552 million, while Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) and XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) recorded inflows of $176.5 million and $125.9 million, respectively. Litecoin... (For the full story, refer to Benzinga.com)

data.title: Japan's finance minister supports including cryptocurrency in portfolios for diversification, ensuring a secure trading environment.
data.description: The Finance Minister of Japan, Katsunobu Kato, expressed support for including cryptocurrency in investment portfolios. He emphasized the importance of establishing a secure trading environment for the sector.
US JULY BUILDING PERMITS REVISED TO -2.2% FROM -2.8%, ANNUAL RATE TO 1.362 MLN UNITS FROM 1.354 MLN UNITS

data.title: Niche releases 2026 Best Colleges Rankings nationwide and by state, helping students find ideal fit.
data.description: The recently released 2026 college rankings by Niche aim to assist students and families in identifying the most suitable higher education institutions based on their objectives, beliefs, and preferences. Niche, a renowned platform that facilitates connections between students, families, colleges, and schools, unveiled the rankings. Their comprehensive assessment provides valuable insights into the best college options available. This updated guide is particularly beneficial for those seeking educational institutions that align with their individual needs.
China's NDRC pledges to boost employment.

data.title: Apple and Alphabet discussing Siri-Gemini iPhone deal and Meta cloud pact, leading to rise in Google stock on Friday.
data.description: On Friday, the stock of Google experienced an increase following reports of discussions between Apple and Alphabet. The talks revolved around a potential agreement involving Siri and Gemini for the iPhone, along with a cloud computing partnership with Meta. Rumors suggest that the negotiations between Apple and Google are intensifying, hinting at possible collaborations in the future.

data.title: SwiftCare Billing marks 5 years as a top medical billing provider in NJ, USA. Based in Marlton. Celebrating its 5th anniversary.
data.description: SwiftCare Billing, based in Marlton, New Jersey, marks a significant milestone by commemorating its five years in the industry as a prominent provider of medical billing and revenue cycle management services in New Jersey and nationwide. The firm has established itself as a leader in the sector since its inception in August 2020. This achievement highlights SwiftCare Billing's strong presence and reputation in the medical billing field, serving numerous clients across the U.S.

data.title: Trump Administration becomes Intel shareholder with $8.9 billion investment, company confirms.
data.description: On Friday evening, Intel officially announced that the Trump Administration has acquired a stake in the ailing chip company. The investment by the administration amounts to $8.9 billion, making them a significant shareholder in Intel. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: EyePoint Pharmaceuticals, Inc. granted non-statutory stock options to new employees outside its 2023 Long-Term Incentive Plan.
data.description: EyePoint Pharmaceuticals, Inc., headquartered in Watertown, Massachusetts, disclosed on Aug. 18, 2025, that they have issued non-statutory stock options to new hires as inducement awards. These awards were granted outside of the 2023 Long-Term Incentive Plan, in line with NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). EyePoint Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is dedicated to developing and marketing therapeutics for serious retinal diseases. Traded as Nasdaq: EYPT, the company aims to enhance the quality of life for patients.

data.title: Safe Bulkers, Inc. sells a 2006 Kamsarmax class dry-bulk vessel for $11.5 million, delivery in September 2025.
data.description: In Monaco on August 12, 2025, Safe Bulkers, Inc. revealed an agreement to sell the MV Pedhoulas Merchant, a Kamsarmax class dry-bulk vessel built in Japan in 2006. The sale price for the vessel is set at $11.5 million, with the delivery scheduled for September 2025. Safe Bulkers, Inc. is known for providing marine drybulk transportation services internationally and is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol NYSE: SB.

data.title: ONEOK partners with WhiteWater, MPLX LP, and Enbridge Inc. to create Eiger Express Pipeline for Permian Basin gas transportation.
data.description: An upcoming initiative known as the Eiger Express Pipeline is set to address the increasing production in the Permian Basin by offering a natural gas transportation solution. The project involves collaboration between ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE: OKE), WhiteWater, MPLX LP (NYSE: MPLX), and Enbridge Inc. (NYSE: ENB) under the Matterhorn joint venture. This development, announced on August 25, 2025, in Tulsa, Oklahoma, aims to cater to the growing needs of the region and signifies a significant step in enhancing natural gas transportation capabilities in the area.

data.title: SRx Health Solutions restructures Canadian subsidiary under CCAA; U.S. operations, including Halo, remain unaffected. No U.S. bankruptcy filed.
data.description: The operations in the United States, which includes the subsidiary Halo, are not anticipated to be impacted by the CCAA Proceedings. It is also expected that there will be no filing for bankruptcy in the United States.

data.title: Global turbine services industry report projects 5.1% CAGR between 2024-2035 driven by increased demand for power generation and aging asset base.
data.description: A new report on the global turbine services industry has been released by ResearchAndMarkets.com, projecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.1% between 2024 and 2035. The report highlights the mature nature of the industry but points out the potential for innovation through advanced solutions. It examines the factors driving market shifts and emphasizes the opportunities for growth and development within the sector. This comprehensive analysis provides insights into the future trends and dynamics of the turbine services market.

data.title: Retail investors are closely watching Q2 earnings of popular stocks like NVDA, PDD, and SMTC with estimates of $14.35B revenue for PDD and $256.09M for SMTC. BEKE and EH will also report earnings. Stay tuned for updates on BOX, OKTA, and MDB after-market. NVDA stock is up 32% year-to-date.
data.description: Investors are gearing up for a busy week of earnings reports, particularly focusing on stocks favored by retail traders. Some notable companies releasing earnings this week include: PDD Holdings Inc. on Monday before market open, with estimated earnings of $1.49 per share on $14.35 billion revenue; and Semtech Corp. on Monday after market close, with analysts expecting 40 cents EPS and $256.09 million revenue. On Tuesday before market open, KE Holdings Inc. and EHang Holdings Limited will announce their earnings. After market close on Tuesday, earnings reports are expected from BOX, Inc., Okta, Inc., and MongoDB, Inc. NVDA stock is up 32% year-to-date. Read further on Benzinga.com.

data.title: OneAmerica Financial® starts 12th 'Week of Caring', thousands of service hours given yearly to 26 nonprofits.
data.description: In the city of Indianapolis, on August 25, 2025, OneAmerica Financial® upholds its annual commitment to community service by allocating a full week to volunteering. Hundreds of employees are expected to dedicate their time to support 26 different nonprofit organizations. This initiative results in thousands of service hours contributed each year towards positively impacting local communities.

data.title: K-Beauty brand Torriden partners with Sephora, launches Dive Into Splash Pop-Up in NYC. Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: Torriden, a top Korean skincare brand focusing on skin barrier health and science-based products, is excited to announce its partnership with Dive Into Splash Pop-Up in New York City. This collaboration marks the return of Torriden to NYC, showcasing their commitment to innovative skincare solutions. The pop-up event highlights the brand's latest products and features interactive demonstrations for attendees to experience firsthand. This partnership comes at a significant time for Torriden, with a recent increase in sales by 15% and a growing global following.
